scripts.docs:api: typedoc --options typedoc.core.json && typedoc --options typedoc.adapter.json && typedoc --options typedoc.streams.json
scripts.publint: publint packages/core && publint packages/adapter-aws-sdk-v3 && publint packages/streams
scripts.attw: attw --profile esm-only --pack packages/core && attw --profile esm-only --pack packages/adapter-aws-sdk-v3 && attw --profile esm-only --pack packages/streams
